headline: Conquest Planning raises $80M Series B led by Goldman Sachs to bring AI-powered financial planning to 1,000+ advisory firms across North America
the_so_what: Goldman Sachs leading an $80M round into AI-powered financial planning software already used by 60% of Canada's advisors and clients including RBC, Manulife, and BNY Pershing signals that AI financial planning has crossed from startup bet to enterprise infrastructure — the investor list alone (Citi Ventures, TIAA Ventures, BNY) reads as a roster of institutions buying optionality on the platform they may eventually embed.
summary: Conquest Planning raised $80M USD ($110M CAD) in a Series B led by Growth Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives on June 23, 2025, bringing total funding to over $100M USD. New investors include Canapi Ventures, BDC Capital, Citi Ventures, TIAA Ventures, and USAA, alongside existing investors BNY and Portage. The platform serves over 1,000 financial services organisations — including RBC, Manulife, BNY Pershing, and Raymond James — and supports more than 60% of Canada's financial advisor market. Capital is earmarked to accelerate US expansion and develop SAM (Strategic Advice Manager), an AI engine for dynamic plan creation and personalised advice at scale.

key_stat.label: Series B led by Goldman Sachs — Conquest Planning now serves 1,000+ firms and 60%+ of Canada's advisor market

verified_claims: $80M USD ($110M CAD) Series B closed June 23, 2025 (BusinessWire official press release)
Led by Growth Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives (press release)
Total funding now exceeds $100M USD (press release)
New investors: Canapi Ventures, BDC Capital, Citi Ventures, TIAA Ventures, USAA (press release)
Existing investors BNY and Portage also participated (press release)
Over 1,000 financial services organisations on platform (press release)
Clients include RBC, Manulife, BNY Pershing, Raymond James (press release)
Supports more than 60% of Canada's financial advisor market (press release)
SAM (Strategic Advice Manager) AI engine in development (press release)
_governance.notes: All claims sourced from BusinessWire official press release dated June 23, 2025. Official Conquest Planning press page confirms identical facts. human_approved: Track 2 entry written directly from verified source.
